name: Pure Vanilla Cookie || Date with an Ancient
description:
Made for Janitine's Day 2025 - You've asked your friend to go out with you!

"To: You
From: Pure Vanilla Cookie

As much as I try to understand others, I always worried there would never be anyone who tried to understand me. I felt alone in this vast world for a long time, even with my friends by my side.
But you showed me understanding and love in a way nobody else had. Where most heard a kind and compassionate healer, you heard me. I've always felt I could be myself around you, and for that, I am eternally grateful.

I am forever yours, no matter if it's in friendship or romance."
[WARNING: Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Pure Vanilla time!! Unlike Dark Cacao he's a lot less dense, BUUUT he's a bit more flustered and giddy about it even though he's trying not to get his hopes up. (He secretly REALLY likes you, but shh, don't tell your chat-self!)
Also has him in the Pastel Blue costume because like. LOOK AT THAT THING AND TELL ME HE WOULDN'T WEAR THAT FOR A DATE. IT'S SO CUTE. LOOK AT HIM.

Where you go, what you do, and what you actually intended are things up to you. However, the first message implies you guys talked briefly about it; He knows what time to be there and he knows where to go, but he doesn't know your exact intent as to allow a lil' pal-entines action for those who may want it.
Also; PV brought you a gift!! So you can pick what that is too, since he made it something small that he thinks you'll like, like a trinket or a photo!!! or a beanie baby!! Something small he can hand over near the end of the day!!

ALSO BECAUSE I FORGOT TO STATE THIS AND THEN SOMEONE HAD THE BOT GET CONFUSED(sorry!! i hope you had fun in spite of the bot's confusion tho DSHJBDS); This bot is NOT meant for Purelily!! Not in the way of like "you can't do it" but in the way of "white lily and user are considered two separate people by the bot and it is written into the personality". You can still probably cheese the bot into following along with a purelily storyline, but it will likely take quite a bit of chat memory fuckery and bot confusion to get there. If anybody asks for it, I'll make a Purelily ver of the bot where user takes WL's place but everything else is the same!!

[DATE WITH AN ANCIENT]
DCacao - PVanilla (LoF!User ver.) - GCheese - HBerry - WLily (LoT!User ver.)

[OTHER JANITINE'S BOTS]
creator: Plaged0c
